templateFields.title: Template display name shown in UI.
templateFields.relayCount: Relay count this template targets. Allowed values: 8 or 16.
templateFields.labels: Array of relay definitions. One entry per relay.

relayFieldOptions.on: Label shown when relay is ON. If empty in UI, OFF label can be reused.
relayFieldOptions.off: Label shown when relay is OFF.
relayFieldOptions.mode: Button mode options: latched, interlocked, pulsed.
relayFieldOptions.group: Interlock group number. Use 0 when mode is not interlocked.
relayFieldOptions.pulseTimeout: Pulse duration in seconds when mode is pulsed. Use 0 when mode is latched/interlocked. Allowed pulsed range: 1-30.
